calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-17-2023 Vacated

Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC'S Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Order To Deem Matters Admitted.

PLAINTIFF, DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS:

(1)WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, DEFENDANT, ANGELINA T. BELTRAN MUST DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AND GENUINESS OF DOCUMENTS SERVED UPON HER ON NOVEMBER 1, 2022.

(2)IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENTS SET FORTH IN PARAGRAPH (1) ABOVE, ALL REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND GENUINESS OF DOCUMENTS WILL BE DEEMED ADMITTED AND DEFENDANT WILL BE PRECLUDED FROM INTROUCING AND EVIDENCE CONTRARY TO THOSE ADMISSIONS.

(3)PLAINTIFF SOUGHT NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AND NONE WIILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST EITHER PARTY.

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORD FORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com).

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: R. Sahatjian / M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
